generated_oml:
// C2: Physical Acting Components
instance MotorActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor driving the first vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
]

instance GearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox transmission component interfacing with the motor and cycloidal gearbox output"
]

instance CycloidalGearboxActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox output component providing mechanical power to the robot's vertical axis"
]

// C3: Physical Sensing Components
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder mounted directly on the motor for precise angular position tracking of the first axis"
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder mounted behind the gearbox to reduce backlash and improve positional uncertainty estimation"
]

instance SINUMERIKController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D CNC controller providing real-time position, speed, and acceleration control via torque/current processing"
]

// C4: Data Transmission Components
instance MotorCurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SINUMERIKController
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of motor current (I_M) via MQTT protocol for friction modeling"
]

instance AngularPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder
    base:desc "Real-time angular position data transmitted via MQTT protocol from both encoders"
]

instance TorqueVelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SINUMERIKController
    base:desc "Derived torque and velocity data transmitted via MQTT protocol from SINUMERIK controller processing"
]

// C10: Models
instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink model implementing Coulomb-Viscous friction dynamics for motor-gearbox subsystem"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink implementation of Stribeck friction model for dynamic friction analysis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink LuGre friction model for detailed kinetic friction representation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance FrictionLossSimulation : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Continuous simulation of static, kinetic, and viscous friction losses in gearbox/motor subsystem"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

instance SystemDynamicsModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Manufacturer-specific dynamics model computing output torque/velocity from input parameters"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulinkEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance MATLABSimulinkEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MathWorks MATLAB Simulink platform for executable simulation of friction models and system dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelingService, MultiPhysicsAwarenessService
]

instance MQTTProtocolEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data (motor current, angular position, torque/velocity)"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataStreamingService
]

// C6: Services
instance FrictionModelingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time integration of white-box (analytical) and black-box (data-driven) friction models for dynamic control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeFrictionIdentificationInsight, ControlAlgorithmOptimizationAction
]

instance VisualizationDashboardService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified visualization of live sensor data, simulated friction models, and deviations between measured/simulated outputs"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataTraceComparisonInsight
]

instance MultiPhysicsAwarenessService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of friction losses (static, kinetic, viscous) using simulation models and data-driven processing"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionLossDetectionInsight
]

instance RealTimeDataStreamingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time streaming of sensor data (motor current, angular position, torque/velocity) via MQTT protocol"
    DTDFVocab:provides SensorDataAvailabilityInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance RealTimeFrictionIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Detection of static, kinetic, and viscous friction losses in the gearbox/motor subsystem in real-time"
]

instance ControlAlgorithmOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic adjustment of friction models to improve robot motion accuracy (reducing positional errors by up to 30%)"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DataTraceComparisonInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Comparison of measured vs. simulated data traces (torque/velocity) to identify deviations and operational anomalies"
]

instance FrictionLossDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of friction losses using simulation models and data-driven processing for enhanced motion accuracy"
]

instance PositionalAccuracyImprovementInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Achievement of improved positional accuracy through real-time friction compensation (targeting ±0.1mm)"
]

// C12: Data
instance MotorCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Real-time motor current measurements (I_M) from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorCurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingService
]

instance AngularPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Precise angular position measurements from encoders (primary and secondary)"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MultiPhysicsAwarenessService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance TorqueVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Derived torque and velocity measurements from SINUMERIK controller processing"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueVelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo FrictionModelingService, VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance SimulatedFrictionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction-influenced outputs derived from MATLAB Simulink models"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MATLABSimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance SimulatedFrictionlessData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated frictionless system outputs for comparison with measured data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MATLABSimulinkEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo VisualizationDashboardService
]

instance MetadataTraceability : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Source tracing metadata for all data points (sensor channel, model origin, timestamp)"
]

// C13: Environment Components
instance RobotFirstAxisEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorActuator, GearboxActuator, CycloidalGearboxActuator,
        MotorEncoder, SecondaryEncoder, SINUMERIKController
]

instance FrictionModelingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains CoulombViscousFrictionModel, StribeckFrictionModel, LuGreFrictionModel,
        FrictionLossSimulation, SystemDynamicsModel
]

instance DataProcessingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains MotorCurrentData, AngularPositionData, TorqueVelocityData,
        SimulatedFrictionData, SimulatedFrictionlessData, MetadataTraceability
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The twinning time scale is **real-time (low-latency)** with the following operational frequencies:
  - **Sensor data acquisition**: Continuous streaming of motor current (*I_M*) and angular position via MQTT.
  - **Friction model updates**: Dynamic exchange of friction models (white-box/black-box) during operation, synchronized with live measurements (e.g., torque/velocity traces) at sub-second intervals.
  - **Dashboard visualization**: Real-time aggregation and comparison of data traces (e.g., reference vs. simulated outputs) for immediate operational insights."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The DT constellation is **centralized and purpose-driven**, focusing on the **first axis of the MABI MAX 100 robot**. It integrates:
  - A **single digital shadow** (FrictionShadow) for friction analysis.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for structuring physical components.
  - **Live data processing** (MQTT) and **simulation models** (MATLAB Simulink) to enable real-time friction identification and visualization."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin operates across the following lifecycle stages:
  - **As designed (ideal)**: Structural and behavioral models (SysML BDD/IBD) define the robot’s first axis architecture, including motor-gearbox interactions.
  - **As manufactured/operated**: Real-time integration of live sensor data (MQTT) and friction models (MATLAB Simulink) to dynamically improve motion accuracy during operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Traceability**: Metadata links data points to their sources (e.g., sensor channel, model origin) for transparency.
  - **Model validation**: Comparison of simulated frictionless and friction-influenced outputs against live measurements (torque/velocity traces).
  - **Uncertainty handling**: Use of dual encoders (motor/gearbox) to reduce positional uncertainty and backlash effects.
  - **Continuous learning**: Dynamic exchange of white-box/black-box friction models to adapt to operational changes (e.g., wear, tooling)."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The DT technical connection uses:
  - **MQTT protocol** for real-time sensor data streaming (motor current, position).
  - **SysML models** (BDD/IBD) for structural and behavioral representation of the robot’s first axis.
  - **Asset Administration Shell (AAS)** for organizing physical components and their interconnections.
  - **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** for executable simulation models (frictionless/friction-influenced behavior)."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The DT follows:
  - **SysML** for structural/behavioral modeling (BDD/IBD).
  - **Digital Shadow Reference Model (DSRM)** for data trace and model organization (UML-based).
  - **MQTT protocol** for real-time data communication.
  - **MathWorks MATLAB Simulink** for simulation modeling."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "The system ensures safety by:
  - **Passive digital shadow design**: No autonomous virtual-to-physical interactions (no remote execution risks),
  - **Real-time data validation**: Continuous comparison of simulated vs. measured data to detect anomalies,
  - **Controlled access**: Sensors and data streams are managed by the Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller with no remote operation capabilities described. No explicit security protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication) are mentioned."
]
